title: rubus × geraniifolius
intro: Rubus × geraniifolius, also known as Geranium-leaved Bramble, is a hybrid plant species in the genus Rubus, which is a cross between the species Rubus fruticosus and Rubus idaeus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which help to reduce pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Rubus × geraniifolius include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. Rubus × geraniifolius can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
